ctaTitle: Ready to protect what matters most?
ctaText: Contact us for a free consultation and custom security system quote.
html:
Professional Security Systems

24/7 Monitored Protection

A professional security system is your property's first line of defense. Sensors detect unauthorized entry, environmental hazards, and emergencies, instantly alerting both you and our 24/7 monitoring station.

When an alarm triggers, our trained operators immediately contact you using your unique passcode. If they can't reach you or confirm it's a false alarm, emergency services are automatically dispatched to your property.

Complete Protection for Your Property

Our comprehensive security solutions protect against intrusion, environmental hazards, and emergencies with professional 24/7 monitoring.

Intrusion Detection

Door, window, and motion sensors provide comprehensive perimeter protection with professional placement that eliminates false alarms. Our systems detect unauthorized entry the moment it happens.

Door Sensors Window Sensors Motion Detection Glass Break Perimeter Protection

Environmental Monitoring

Fire, carbon monoxide, flood, and freeze detection protect your property from hazards beyond break-ins. Early warning systems alert you before minor issues become major disasters.

Smoke Detection CO Monitoring Flood Sensors Freeze Alerts 24/7 Response

24/7 Professional Monitoring

ULC-listed monitoring station with 31 years of proven reliability. When alarms trigger, trained operators respond immediately, contacting you, verifying the situation, and dispatching emergency services if needed.

ULC Listed 31 Years Experience Instant Response Emergency Dispatch Passcode Verification

Why Choose Professional Security

Professional monitoring provides peace of mind, financial benefits, and complete ownership of your security equipment.

Peace of Mind

Know that your property and loved ones are protected 24/7. Professional monitoring provides confidence and security whether you're home or away.

Insurance Benefits

Professional monitoring qualifies for significant home insurance discounts that often offset monitoring costs.

Equipment Ownership

You own all equipment from day one. No rental fees or long-term contracts required.

Industry-Leading Technology

Modern connectivity and smartphone control keep you connected to your security system from anywhere.

Cellular Communication

No landline required. 4G/LTE technology ensures reliable connection to monitoring station, even if phone lines are cut.

Smartphone Control

Total Connect 2.0 app provides complete system control and instant alerts from anywhere in the world.

Flexible Monitoring Options

We strongly recommend cellular monitoring for all our security systems. Unlike landline monitoring, cellular communication uses 4G/LTE technology that can't be disabled by cutting phone lines, ensuring reliable alerts even if your landline is damaged or unavailable. Additionally, cellular-based or IP-based monitoring is required for access to Total Connect 2.0, our mobile app that provides complete system control, instant alerts, video feeds, and smart home integration from anywhere. These features are not available with traditional landline service. While we do offer landline monitoring options, cellular monitoring provides superior protection and is our preferred choice for comprehensive security coverage.

* All monitoring options are invoiced annually. If you decide to cancel your monitoring at anytime we require 30 days written notice prior to cancellation. We will then refund you the remainder owing for the rest of the year.*
